subject: Old - English
note: Practice feed me correct answer nahi hota; jaha ID important-questions se match hua waha answer bhara hai (answer_source).

questions.question_text: Kavita said that she ________ already cooked.
A crazy man asked me whether I ________ the way to paradise.
Suman asked her friends at ________ time she would come back.
The man asked mechanic by what time he would ________ fixed the tyre of the car.
Suraj asks Mohit where he went ________.
She asked ________ there was anything special.
Kumar exclaimed with ________ that he could sense a fire in the adjacent building.
He exclaimed with sorrow that they ________ lost the game.
She told me ________ she had been to London.
Passive voice of the sentence She offered them a seat is:

options.label: A
options.text: A seat is offered to them by her.

options.label: B
options.text: They are offered a seat by she.

options.label: C
options.text: A seat was offered to them by her.

options.label: D
options.text: They are offered a seat by her.

questions.correct_answer: A seat was offered to them by her.
questions.solution: A seat was offered to them by her.

questions.question_text: Passive voice of the sentence Rohan feeds the dog is

options.label: A
options.text: The dog was fed by him.

options.label: B
options.text: The dog is fed by Rohan.

options.label: C
options.text: The dog is fed by him.

options.label: D
options.text: The dog was fed by Rohan.

questions.correct_answer: The dog is fed by Rohan.
questions.solution: The dog is fed by Rohan.

questions.question_text: Active voice of the sentence Some advice will be given to you by the doctor.

options.label: A
options.text: Doctor has to give you some advice.

options.label: B
options.text: Doctor shall give you some advice.

options.label: C
options.text: Doctor had to given by some advice.

options.label: D
options.text: The Doctor will give you some advice.

questions.correct_answer: The Doctor will give you some advice.
questions.solution: The Doctor will give you some advice.

questions.question_text: Passive voice of the sentence They were calling us.

options.label: A
options.text: We had to be called by them.

options.label: D
options.text: We were being called by them.

questions.correct_answer: We were being called by them.
questions.solution: We were being called by them.

questions.question_text: Active voice of the sentence Water could be thrown by her.
The book is being ________ by me.
Lucky draw ________ be won by him.
A stone ________ being thrown by him yesterday.
The match has ________ abandoned due to rain.
The mango is ________ eaten by the boys.

Kusum answered the questions. (Active)
The questions ________ answered by Kusum. (Passive)

The gardener has planted some trees. (Active)
Some trees ________ planted by the gardener. (Passive)

Some one is repairing the instrument. (Active)
The instrument ________ repaired. (Passive)

I love apples. (Active)
Apples ________ loved by me. (Passive)

The team had won the game. (Active)
The game ________ won by the team. (Passive)
Ajay said, "I love this city".

options.label: A
options.text: Ajay said that I love this city.

options.label: B
options.text: Ajay told that he loved this city.

options.label: C
options.text: Ajay said that he loved that city.

options.label: D
options.text: Ajay said if I love that city.

questions.correct_answer: Ajay said that he loved that city.
questions.solution: Ajay said that he loved that city.

questions.question_text: She says to Shweta, "We have to go home".

options.label: A
options.text: She tells Shweta that we have to go home.

options.label: B
options.text: She asked Shweta if they have to go home.

options.label: C
options.text: She tells Shweta that they have to go home.

options.label: D
options.text: She told Shweta that we have to go home.

questions.correct_answer: She tells Shweta that they have to go home.
questions.solution: She tells Shweta that they have to go home.

questions.question_text: I said to you "Will you have a book"?

options.label: A
options.text: I asked you if you would have a book

options.label: B
options.text: I told you if you would have a book

options.label: C
options.text: I asked you that you will have a book

options.label: D
options.text: I ask you if I would have a book

questions.correct_answer: I asked you if you would have a book
questions.solution: I asked you if you would have a book

questions.question_text: She said to me, "What are you writing"?

options.label: A
options.text: She asked me if she was writing

options.label: B
options.text: She told me what she was writing

options.label: C
options.text: She ask me that what I was writing

options.label: D
options.text: She asked me what I was writing

questions.correct_answer: She asked me what I was writing
questions.solution: She asked me what I was writing

questions.question_text: I said to him, "Suresh should obey his teacher".

options.label: A
options.text: I tell him if Suresh should obey my teacher.

options.label: B
options.text: I ask him that he should obey his teacher.

options.label: C
options.text: I told him that Suresh should obey his teacher.

options.label: D
options.text: I tell him that Suresh should obey his teacher.

questions.correct_answer: I told him that Suresh should obey his teacher.
questions.solution: I told him that Suresh should obey his teacher.

questions.question_text: I asked Jyoti ________ she travelled to office.
The teacher has taught this lesson. Which of the following options correctly changes the VOICE of this sentence?

options.label: A
options.text: This lesson has taught the teacher.

options.label: B
options.text: The teacher has been taught this lesson.

options.label: C
options.text: This lesson has been taught by the teacher.

options.label: D
options.text: This lesson had been taught by the teacher.

questions.correct_answer: This lesson has been taught by the teacher.
questions.solution: The given sentence is in Present Perfect tense. So, to change it in passive voice has + been + verb3 + by should be used. So, the sentence given in this option 'This lesson has been taught by the teacher' is the correct passive form of the given sentence.

questions.question_text: I asked Sheela, "Why are you looking so pale today?"

options.label: A
options.text: I said to Sheela why was she looking so pale that day.

options.label: B
options.text: I was asking Sheela why she is looking so pale today.

options.label: C
options.text: I asked to Sheela why she looking so pale today.

options.label: D
options.text: I asked Sheela why she was looking so pale that day.

questions.correct_answer: I asked Sheela why she was looking so pale that day.
questions.solution: 'I asked Sheela why she was looking so pale that day', is the correct indirect speech of the given sentence.

questions.question_text:
Read the sentence given below and choose the option which correctly changes it into Passive voice.
Can Anil lose his book?

options.label: A
options.text: His book can be lost by Anil.

options.label: B
options.text: Can his book be lost by Anil?

options.label: C
options.text: Could his book be lost by Anil?

options.label: D
options.text: His book could be lost by Anil.

questions.correct_answer: Can his book be lost by Anil?
questions.solution: Can his book be lost by Anil?

questions.question_text:
Surbhi said to Anu, "My mother is not well so I won't be able to come for the dance practice today".
Surbhi told Anu that her mother was not well so she would not be able to go for dance practice that day.
Surbhi told to Anu her mother was not well so she will not be able to come for dance practice the next day.
Surbhi says to Anu that her mother is not well so she will not be able to go for dance practice that day.
Surbhi said to Anu that my mother is not well so she will not be able to come for dance practice today.
questions.solution: Surbhi told Anu that her mother was not well so she would not be able to go for dance practice that day.

questions.question_text:
Convert into Passive voice.
We must face new situations with a creative mind.

options.label: A
options.text: Everyone should face the new situations with a creative mind.

options.label: B
options.text: New situations must face us with a creative mind.

options.label: C
options.text: New situations must be faced by us with a creative mind.

options.label: D
options.text: New situations need faced by us with a creative mind.

questions.correct_answer: New situations must be faced by us with a creative mind.
questions.solution: While converting an active voice sentence into passive voice, then the verb takes the third form as the sentence has the modal verb. Therefore, 'face' become 'faced'.

questions.question_text: He said, "can you sing?" and I said, "no."

options.label: A
options.text: He asked me if I could sing and I replied that I could not.

options.label: B
options.text: I denied, when he asked me if you could sing.

options.label: C
options.text: He asked me if I could sing and I said no.

options.label: D
options.text: He asked me that could I sing and I refused.

questions.correct_answer: He asked me if I could sing and I replied that I could not.
questions.solution: In the given Direct speech, a question is asked. Hence, said would be replaced by 'asked' and the question would start with 'if'. Further, there is also a reply. Hence, 'replied' would be used with 'that'.

questions.question_text:
Select the alternative which best expresses the same sentence in indirect speech.
Socrates said, "Virtue is its own reward".

options.label: A
options.text: Socrates said that virtue had its own reward.

options.label: B
options.text: Socrates said that virtue have its own reward.

options.label: C
options.text: Socrates said that virtue is its own reward.

options.label: D
options.text: Socrates said that virtue was its own reward.

questions.correct_answer: Socrates said that virtue is its own reward.
questions.solution: Socrates said that virtue is its own reward.

questions.question_text:
Select the alternative which best expresses the same sentence in active/passive voice.
A week is made of seven days

options.label: B
options.text: There are seven days in a week

questions.question_text:
Choose the correct passive from of the given sentence from the following
Don't subject the animals to cruelty

options.label: A
options.text: The animals are not to be subjected to cruelty

options.label: B
options.text: The animals should not be subjected to cruelty

options.label: C
options.text: The animals will not be subjected to cruelty

options.label: D
options.text: The animals shall not be subjected to cruelty

questions.correct_answer: The animals should not be subjected to cruelty
questions.solution: The animals should not be subjected to cruelty

questions.question_text:
Choose the one which is the correct indirect speech the sentence given below.
He said, "I can speak four languages."

options.label: A
options.text: He boasted that he can speak four larguages.

options.label: B
options.text: He boasted that he would speak four languages.

options.label: C
options.text: He boasted that he could speak four languages.

options.label: D
options.text: He boasted that he will be able to speak four languages.

questions.correct_answer: He boasted that he could speak four languages.
questions.solution: He boasted that he could speak four languages.

questions.question_text:
Choose the one which is the correct Active Voice of the sentence given below.
By whom were you given these orders?

options.label: A
options.text: Who has given you these orders?

options.label: C
options.text: Who was giving you these orders?

options.label: D
options.text: Who had given you these orders?

questions.question_text:
Out of the given options, choose the one which is the correct indirect speech of the sentence given below.
Mother said to the children, "I have often told you not to play with fire."

options.label: A
options.text: Mother told the children that she had often told them not to play with fire.

options.label: B
options.text: Mother told the children that she had often been telling them not to play with fire.

options.label: C
options.text: Mother told the children that she has often told them not to play with fire.

options.label: D
options.text: Mother told the children that she have often told them not to play with fire.

questions.correct_answer: Mother told the children that she had often told them not to play with fire.
questions.solution: Mother told the children that she had often told them not to play with fire.

questions.question_text:
Choose the one which is the correct active voice of the sentence given below.
The fields are being ploughed by the farmers.

options.label: A
options.text: The fields have been ploughed by the farmers.

options.label: B
options.text: The farmers are ploughing the fields.

options.label: C
options.text: The farmers have ploughed the fields.

options.label: D
options.text: The farmers have been ploughing the fields.

questions.correct_answer: The farmers are ploughing the fields.
questions.solution: The farmers are ploughing the fields.

questions.question_text:
Choose the active voice of the sentence:
The poor are helped by her.

options.label: C
options.text: She is helped by the poor.
